all.critique:
The overall logic analysis is very thorough and mostly in line with the intended behavior of the DatasetLoader module. However, there are a few points that could be further clarified or improved. Here are the issues I found, along with the functions or parts they affect and a severity estimate for each:

1. Tokenization Edge Case Handling (Medium)  
 • In the section on preprocessing for VAE latent tokenization, the analysis notes that if the computed token_count exceeds L_max, one “possible str
